message:
web: Migrate shadcn components to Base UI with Vega style

- Switch from Radix UI primitives to Base UI
- Update theme to neutral colors with smaller radius (0.45rem)
- Add Inter font and tw-animate-css for animations
- Pin better-auth to 1.4.11 to avoid TanStack version conflicts
- Add backward-compatible asChild support to Button and TooltipTrigger

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/f1df4788-58e4-4d80-8c4d-045b30697b98
